mapper.sql: tb_school s JOIN tb_province p ON s.school_id = p.school_id JOIN tb_year y ON p.province_id = y.province_id JOIN tb_category c ON y.year_id = c.year_id JOIN tb_batch b ON c.category_id = b.category_id JOIN tb_score sc ON b.batch_id = sc.batch_id

sc.first_choice = #{dto.firstChoice} AND p.province_name = #{dto.province}
AND sc.min_ranking > #{dto.ranking} + 5000 AND sc.min_ranking <= #{dto.ranking} + 10000
AND sc.min_ranking >= #{dto.ranking} - 3000 AND sc.min_ranking <= #{dto.ranking} + 5000
AND sc.min_ranking >= #{dto.ranking} - 7500 AND sc.min_ranking < #{dto.ranking} - 3000
AND sc.min_ranking between #{dto.ranking} - 7500 and #{dto.ranking} + 10000
mapper.select:
SELECT s.school_id FROM WHERE GROUP BY s.school_id
ORDER BY s.score DESC
ORDER BY MAX(sc.min_score) DESC
LIMIT #{dto.pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT s.school_id, s.school_head, s.school_name, s.school_province, s.rank_list, sc.major_name, sc.first_choice, sc.other_choice, sc.special, sc.major_id, y.year, sc.min_score, sc.min_ranking FROM WHERE s.school_id IN
#{id}
AND
ORDER BY s.score DESC
ORDER BY sc.min_score DESC

SELECT s.school_id, s.school_head, s.school_name, s.school_province, s.rank_list, sc.major_id, sc.major_name, sc.first_choice, sc.other_choice, sc.special FROM tb_school s JOIN tb_province p ON s.school_id = p.school_id JOIN tb_year y ON p.province_id = y.province_id JOIN tb_category c ON y.year_id = c.year_id JOIN tb_batch b ON c.category_id = b.category_id JOIN tb_score sc ON b.batch_id = sc.batch_id where sc.major_id = #{majorId}
